items.title: k-NN and clustering pipelines
items.description: Recommendation and segmentation jobs standardize user behavior counts and monetary features before k-NN classification or k-means so neighbors reflect profile shape, not currency units.

items.title: Regularized regression APIs
items.description: Ridge and Lasso services scale numeric inputs in training pipelines so λ penalties apply fairly across age, income, and engineered ratios.

items.title: Neural network input layers
items.description: Computer vision and tabular NNs often MinMax or standardize features to stabilize activations and optimizer steps across heterogeneous sensors.

items.title: PCA and dimensionality reduction
items.description: PCA on mixed-unit tables uses StandardScaler so principal components reflect correlation structure instead of whichever column has the largest variance in raw units.
